Bad Aspects : Immoral acts, unhappiness, destructive thoughts and acts, loss of wealth & loss in

Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
55

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
Q = 19 yrs r =4 yrs u =15 yrs s = 10 yrs V= 12 yrs T=8 yrs
W=29.5 yrs (30) X = 84 yrs Y= 165 yrs Z = 247 yrs </> = 18 yrs a b c ; 12 yr
Venus & Neptune :
Good aspect with natal or paribhraman Neptune.:Interest in fine arts, music, dancing; performing
religious rites, etc.
Bad Aspect : with natal or paribhraman Neptune cultivating vices; experiences loss of wealth
through deceit, hypocrisy, does covert deeds.
Venus & Rahu/ Ketu :
Good aspects with natal Rahu/ Ketu: Gains wealth, promotions & advancement in service &
business with success.
Bad aspects: problems from women, loss of wealth and addicted to various vices.
V. Mars & other planets
